prompt: Create a high-end studio portrait of a confident adult man with medium tan skin from the chest up, centered against a seamless deep black background. He has a sharp short buzz cut with slightly longer spiked texture on top, a clean fade at the sides, thick dark eyebrows, a full well-groomed black beard, and a calm serious expression with closed lips, facing slightly to the viewer’s left. He wears glossy black Ray-Ban style sunglasses with black lenses, a black front frame, red temple arms, and a subtle city skyline reflected across both lenses. Dress him in an elegant all-black outfit: exactly 2 visible clothing pieces, a fitted ribbed black turtleneck sweater and a tailored black blazer with lapels. Use warm cinematic key lighting from the front-left to sculpt the face and beard, gentle rim highlights on the hair and shoulders, realistic skin texture, crisp facial hair detail, premium fashion editorial mood, shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic digital photography look, vertical 3:4 composition, no text, no watermark, no extra accessories.
promptEn: Create a high-end studio portrait of a confident adult man with medium tan skin from the chest up, centered against a seamless deep black background. He has a sharp short buzz cut with slightly longer spiked texture on top, a clean fade at the sides, thick dark eyebrows, a full well-groomed black beard, and a calm serious expression with closed lips, facing slightly to the viewer’s left. He wears glossy black Ray-Ban style sunglasses with black lenses, a black front frame, red temple arms, and a subtle city skyline reflected across both lenses. Dress him in an elegant all-black outfit: exactly 2 visible clothing pieces, a fitted ribbed black turtleneck sweater and a tailored black blazer with lapels. Use warm cinematic key lighting from the front-left to sculpt the face and beard, gentle rim highlights on the hair and shoulders, realistic skin texture, crisp facial hair detail, premium fashion editorial mood, shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic digital photography look, vertical 3:4 composition, no text, no watermark, no extra accessories.
promptZh: 创作一张高端摄影棚肖像，主角为 一位肤色中等偏深、自信的成年男性，构图为胸部以上，居中对齐，背景为无缝的深黑色。他留着利落的短寸头，顶部纹理略长，两侧修剪整齐，眉毛浓密，留着修剪得体的黑色络腮胡，表情冷静严肃，双唇紧闭，面部略微朝向观察者的左侧。他佩戴着光面黑色雷朋风格墨镜，镜片为黑色，镜框前部为黑色，镜腿为红色，双侧镜片上隐约反射出城市天际线。为他穿上优雅的全黑服饰：仅限 2 件可见衣物，一件修身黑色罗纹高领毛衣和一件带有翻领的定制黑色西装外套。使用从左前方照射的温暖电影感主光来勾勒面部和胡须轮廓，头发和肩部带有柔和的轮廓光，展现真实的皮肤质感和清晰的胡须细节，营造高端时尚编辑风格，浅景深，超写实数码摄影效果，垂直 3:4 构图，无文字，无水印，无额外配饰。
